overview: Magnum Telehealth offers testosterone replacement therapy, medical weight loss, and peptide therapies via telehealth. Each personalized treatment plan includes lab testing, ongoing monitoring, and lifestyle guidance.
highlights: Telehealth consultations with home medication delivery
Comprehensive lab testing with ongoing treatment adjustments
Also offers peptide therapies and semaglutide weight-loss solutions
targetAudience: Men experiencing symptoms of low testosterone such as fatigue, weight gain, mood changes, and decreased sexual function.
